buildCommand: sed -i 's|__SUPABASE_URL__|'"$SUPABASE_URL"'|g' src/js/config.js && sed -i 's|__SUPABASE_ANON_KEY__|'"$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY"'|g' src/js/config.js && sed -i 's|__VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY__|'"$VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY"'|g' src/js/config.js

headers.value: default-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://open.er-api.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; media-src blob: mediastream:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://open.er-api.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net;
